# RemoveFormatting

<img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," alt="RemoveFormatting icon">

<div class="dioxus-icons-widget" data-icon-name="RemoveFormatting" data-svg="&lt;svg xmlns=&quot;http://www.w3.org/2000/svg&quot; width=&quot;24&quot; height=&quot;24&quot; viewBox=&quot;0 0 24 15-5 5&quot;&gt;&lt;/path&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;" data-size="24" data-color="#000000" data-stroke="2"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-header"><div class="dioxus-icons-widget-preview" data-di-preview="true" class="a-s">&quot;#000000&quot;</span><span class="a-p">,</span><span> </span><span class="a-pr">stroke_width</span><span class="a-p">:</span><span> </span><span class="a-co">2</span><span> data-di-copy-label="true">Copy RSX</span></button></div></div>

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::RemoveFormatting;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        RemoveFormatting { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
text, font, typography, format, x, remove, delete, times, clear

## Categories
text

## Source
